'''Maggy the Gorgon's''' was a tavern in a section of [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] that was not controlled by [[Jabba's criminal empire/Legends|the Hutts]]. The tasty drink, [[ruby bliel]], was known to have been served there. It was often a dangerous place to enter, home to plenty of brawls. [[Shmi Skywalker Lars/Legends|Shmi Skywalker]] asked her son [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin]] to buy his ruby bliel from here, rather than from the [[Blue Brubb]]. It was at this location that Anakin learned about the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] from an old [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]].
